# BLB — Full Card Reference (Visual Grid)

*Every draftable BLB card (271 total) as a tile: image, 17Lands ratings, Draftsim grade, expert-guide notes, and an AI take. Ratings: 17Lands PremierDraft (1200-day sample). Generated by `build_card_reference.py`.*

**Legend** — **GIH** = Games-in-Hand WR (primary) · **IWD** = Improvement When Drawn (pp) · **ALSA** = Avg Last Seen At (lower = earlier) · **OH/GD** = Opening-Hand / Drawn WR · **Play** = play rate · **CGB** = CardGameBase letter grade.  🤖 AI · 📘 Lords of Limited · 🎙 NumotTheNummy · 🎧 Limited Resources.
